sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 15 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.19 2. For orders on CMA No.02/2018 3. For hearing of main case 19.11.2025 Mr. Jahanzaib Baloch, advocate for the applicant Mr. Ghazi Khan Khalil, advocate for respondent Pursuant to order dated 15.10.2025, it is jointly submitted that the impugned order be set aside and the matter be remanded back for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
